channel.title: Strands Agents Blog - Structured Output
channel.description: Posts tagged with "Structured Output" from the Strands Agents blog.

item.title: Inside Agentic Football Cup: 10 Strands Agents, 1 Second to Decide
item.description: How we use Strands Agents and the model-driven approach to run 5v5 autonomous football matches inside a 4-hour developer workshop, with a hard latency contract, structured outputs, and multi-agent coordination.
